other_observers: Andrew Spencer and Forest Luke; First seen by Lisa Edwards, Kara Lewantowicz, Bill Maynard, and Brandon Percival on March 18.
specific_location: It was at the Banding Station at Chico Basin Ranch.
description: Bright red head, chest, belly, and undertail covert. Black on the eye strips, back of the head, back, and tail. It also had a small black billBehaviors: It was bug catching and it kept landing on the tops of bushes. It usually stayed in the opening.Call: Didn't hear itPlumage: Adult
